clusters.justification: These terms map onto widespread cortico-amygdalar and anterior insula co-activations, representing the broad macroscopic domain of emotional reactivity, mood, and valence processing.

These terms converge functionally on frontostriatal and dopaminergic circuitry, forming the core macro-domain responsible for computing incentive salience, reward outcomes, and guiding motivated choices.

These terms robustly anchor to the large-scale Default Mode Network architecture, reflecting an overarching functional axis dedicated to internally directed, self-referential, and interpersonal semantic models.
